flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Centenary University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (68.4% → 56.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Centenary University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 910).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Centenary University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Centenary University rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 (38.6% → 50.7%).
